reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Amplio predio pero el dueño poca paciencia cuando de junta mucha gente

(Translated by Google)
Large property but the owner has little patience when a lot of people gather.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tONmNWOTZaV3g0ZFhFMU9UWktiVTlWYm5aNlgxRRAB

reviews.comment:
Maravillosa sorpresa! Gran predio abierto con sombra para descansar. Baños en buen estado, personal amable y la MEJOR SORPRESA: el sandwich de mortadela! Hacia tiempo no comia un sandwich tan rico y con tan buenos ingredientes. Esta YPF se acaba de convertir en mi parada obligada cada vez que transite por esta zona de la ruta 3.

(Translated by Google)
What a wonderful surprise! A large, open area with plenty of shade to relax in. The restrooms were in good condition, the staff was friendly, and the BEST SURPRISE: the mortadella sandwich! It had been ages since I'd had such a delicious sandwich with such great ingredients. This YPF has now become my go-to stop whenever I'm traveling along Route 3.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsV1pWVlhRMk5qU1ZvMmRYZFpaSE5rYXpkRllXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Me sorprendió este lugar del ACA, desprolijo, no tiene servicios, solo NAFTA y baños.

(Translated by Google)
I was surprised by this ACA place; it's untidy, has no services, just gasoline and bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210emQxRjVaMjVyVUVoNFRsRXlVbUZLYVZSMlduYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, como toda YPF, máxime teniendo en cuenta que esta asociado al A.C.A,con sus descuentos por ser socio. Con sus prestaciones muy recomendable. Bien ubicado, los mejores precios de mercado. Sanitarios óptimos y muy bien cuidados. Muy recomendable 👌

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, as with all YPF stations, especially considering its affiliation with the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), offering member discounts. Highly recommended for its amenities. Conveniently located, with the best prices on the market. Excellent and well-maintained restrooms. Highly recommended 👌
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xbllqWnNTV1IxYWs1U2EwbGtNRTk1VDA1RmQyYxAB

reviews.comment:

Excellent service, fill up with gas or diesel, very clean restrooms

reviews.comment:
Los sandwichs de crudo mejores de mí vida y excelente precio. Los felicito. Excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
The best raw beef sandwiches I've ever had, and at a great price. Congratulations! Excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Bien.  Cambiaron de consesionario. Pero siguen con la misma calidad.  Grandes sándwiches de jamón crudo y de cualquier otro fiambre. Descuento si sos socio del ACÁ

(Translated by Google)
Good. They changed concessionaires. But the quality remains the same. Great prosciutto sandwiches and sandwiches with any other cold cuts. Discount if you're an ACA member.
